summary: ForgeSlicer iter 52 P2 polish batch — full coverage of voice button aria attrs, STL preview bed-clearance chip (both states), Gallery bbox + too-big chips (both states + legacy null safety), backend gallery POST/GET bbox_mm round-trip, composite store smoke (slot/fastener/countersink/hexPocket/gusset), and undo-after-composite. Plus regression on sketch-to-sweep (iter 51 P1). Everything PASS.

node_unit_tests.composites-smoke.mjs: PASS (50+ assertions: slot 3 parts + shared groupId, fastener 4 parts with [+, -, -, +] modifiers, countersink cyl+cone both negative, hex pocket cyl with segments=6, gusset 1 positive triangle)
node_unit_tests.sketch-to-sweep.mjs: PASS (9 assertions — iter 51 P1 sweep-from-sketch regression intact)

backend_api.GET /api/gallery: 200 — legacy items show bbox_mm=null, new items carry the bbox object

frontend_ui.Voice button aria attrs: data-testid='voice-btn' has aria-pressed='false' and aria-label='Voice command' in idle state — matches spec
frontend_ui.Gallery bbox chip: gallery-bbox-<id> renders '300×100×50' as expected; absent for legacy item (no crash on null bbox_mm)
frontend_ui.Gallery too-big chip: gallery-bed-too-big-<id> renders 'too big' for 300×100×50 item against 220×220×250 custom printer; absent on 40×20×60 item (fits)
frontend_ui.STL Preview stats overlay: data-testid='stl-preview-stats' shows tris/bbox/size/bed lines. Default 20mm cube vs 220×220×250 → 'fits ✓' chip (stl-preview-fits). Shrunk buildVolume 10×10×10 vs same 20mm cube → 'too big' chip (stl-preview-too-big). Both states verified visually + by selector count.
frontend_ui.Composite store smoke (in-browser): All 5 builders produce expected scene objects via window.__forgeStore (slot=3, fastener=4, countersink=2, hexPocket=1, gusset=1)
frontend_ui.Undo composite: addSlot (3 parts) → undo() → 0 objects in a single step ✓

critical_code_review_comments: Gallery.GalleryCard mapping (bbox.x↔BV.x, bbox.z↔BV.y, bbox.y↔BV.z) is consistent with STLPreviewStats — both correctly treat BV.y as plate-depth and BV.z as height, matching three.js Y-up convention noted in the iter 52 brief. No mismatch.

/app/frontend/src/lib/store.js: 1481→1312 lines (~11.4% reduction) by extracting pure builders into lib/composites.js — good separation. Composite builders are pure (no store ref), making them unit-testable in node, as evidenced by the passing composites-smoke.mjs.
VoiceButton.jsx aria-pressed expression `stage === 'recording' || stage === 'confirming' || goRunningRef.current` correctly covers both ad-hoc recording and Go-mode loop — matches spec.
Backend GalleryItemCreate/GalleryItemMeta optional bbox_mm field is properly Optional[BBox] with default None — backwards-compatible.
Minor: 401 errors observed on /api/me/* during UI smoke (expected — the seeded session_token wasn't bound to a profile fetch path); harmless and unrelated to iter 52 scope.
test_credentials: Seeded ad-hoc mongo session_token st_test_1780016552993 → cleaned up after run. No new persistent credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_ gallery items (with bbox / without bbox / too-big bbox) for the chip-rendering UI smoke; all 3 deleted via DELETE /api/gallery/<id> at teardown (all returned 200).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter 52 P2 polish items pass end-to-end. Node tests under /app/frontend/tests/ (composites-smoke.mjs, sketch-to-sweep.mjs, sweep-geometry.mjs) are the fastest regression gate — run with `cd /app/frontend && node tests/<name>.mjs`. For UI smoke against the gallery chips, you can POST a synthetic item with bbox_mm via curl (see other_misc_info in the brief) and inspect with selectors `gallery-bbox-<id>` / `gallery-bed-too-big-<id>`. STL preview can be triggered programmatically: open via `[data-testid=stl-preview-btn]`. The window.__forgeStore handle is exposed for direct store mutation (useful for forcing fits/too-big states by shrinking buildVolume to 10×10×10).
